dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump demanded Republicans pass a reconciliation bill by June 1 to fund ICE and border agents, bypassing Democrats who refuse to fund immigration operations.

dailyNews.title: Why the Strait of Hormuz matters as Trump issues fresh ultimatum to Iran
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump gives Iran deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz to all vessels or face strikes as oil, gas, diesel and jet fuel prices climb worldwide.

dailyNews.title: Trump's profanity-laced ultimatum to Iran looms over new bid for truce
dailyNews.description: Trump's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it doesn't make a deal to end the war by Tuesday is looming over a Pakistani ceasefire push.

dailyNews.title: Liam Ramos' parents say 5-year-old constantly worries about being detained by ICE again
dailyNews.description: In a CBS News exclusive interview, Camilo Montoya-Galvez speaks with five-year-old Liam Ramos and his parents about their detainment by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, and how the Trump administration is still trying to deport them.

dailyNews.title: CIA World Factbook shuttered by Trump administration
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has shut down the CIA World Factbook, and there's much lamenting about the demise of a free, trusted source many people used to check basic facts about countries.

dailyNews.title: "WE GOT HIM!," Trump declares after U.S. airman rescued deep inside Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump hailed the rescue of a U.S. airman who was missing almost two days inside Iran — and threatened to hit power plants if Iran doesn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: 4/5: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Latest details on daring mission to rescue U.S. airman from Iran after fighter jet shot down; Trump sends profanity-laden threat to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Missing U.S. crew member from downed fighter jet rescued in Iran, Trump says
dailyNews.description: A U.S. crew member who went missing when an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over a remote area of Iran has been rescued by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: On Iran, Trump Keeps World Off Balance With Ever-Changing Threats
dailyNews.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Lesson From Risky Rescue: Threaten to Go Harder at Iran
dailyNews.description: In an expletive-laced social media post, the president said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he would bomb bridges and power plants.
